response: Claude's training data is updated periodically, but each model has a knowledge cutoff. The most recent models (Opus 4.7 and Opus 4.6) were trained on data up until January 2026 and August 2025, respectively. This means that the model may not be aware of events or information that occurred after these dates.
justification: Article: How up-to-date is Claude's training data? (https://support.claude.com/en/articles/8114494-how-up-to-date-is-claudes-training-data)

response: To set up Claude LTI for your students, go to Admin -> Developer Keys in Canvas and create a new developer key. Follow steps 1-7 under Creating Claude LTI Developer Key in Canvas. Then, install Claude LTI as an app by selecting Configuration Type 'By Client ID' and inputting the generated Client ID. For more information on installing Claude LTI, refer to Installing Claude LTI as an App in Canvas.
justification: Article: Creating Claude LTI Developer Key in Canvas
